title: Afk Pond
description: Afk Pond Is a Rewards Plugin that Rewards players for Being afk in the selected region. Reward Players!! 1.21+
body:
**Afk Pond - Reward Your Players for Relaxing!**

# See it in action on caninecraft.reviverealm.net

Afk Pond is a powerful yet simple Minecraft plugin designed to engage your players and add value to their AFK time. With this plugin, server administrators can create designated AFK regions which track and reward players for staying within these areas. Players can relax in these serene spots and earn rewards based on customizable command tables.

**Key Features:**
- **Customizable AFK Regions**: Easily set up AFK Ponds in any world using the unique region name. You can even establish multiple ponds across different worlds, all tied to the same name for a seamless experience.
- **Flexible Reward System**: Configure up to 4 command-based rewards in the `config.yml`. By default, the system includes 3 pre-set commands, with the option to add an additional one if needed.
- **Adjustable Reward Intervals**: Fine-tune how frequently rewards are given, ensuring balanced gameplay and keeping players motivated to visit your AFK Pond.
- **BossBar Color Customization**: Personalize the BossBar color shown to players while they wait in the AFK Pond, using configurable options like BLUE, RED, or GREEN in the `config.yml`.
- **Reload Commands & Permissions**: Easily reload the plugin configuration in-game with the `/pond reload` or `/afkpond reload` commands. Permissions are managed through `afkpond.reload`, giving control to server operators or designated players.
- **Multi-World Support**: Set up AFK Ponds across multiple worlds on your server, perfect for larger networks or multi-world setups.

Afk Pond is the ideal plugin for server owners who want to add a touch of relaxation and reward to their communities. Dive into the tranquility of your very own AFK Pond today and let your players enjoy the benefits!
